tasks.name: Identify All Embryo Positions
tasks.description: Use image processing to identify the coordinates of all embryos in the image and create a list of embryos and their corresponding positions.

tasks.name: Identify Orientation of All Embryos
tasks.description: Identify the difference in the angle of each embryo from horizontal. Add to the list of positions as a separte column of orientations.

tasks.name: Determine the Final Position and Orientation needed for All Embryos
tasks.description: Identify what coordinates and orientation is needed for the correct final position of each embryo and at to the list of position and orientation list as a final column.

tasks.name: Select Next Embryo
tasks.description: Choose the next embryo from the list of identified embryos

tasks.name: Approach Selected Embryo
tasks.description: Adhere to the target embryo and lift the embryo from the dish

tasks.name: Translate to the Target Position
tasks.description: Move the embryo to the target position and hover

tasks.name: Orient the Embryo
tasks.description: Adjust the orientation of the embryo to the desired angle

tasks.name: Lower the Embryo and Release
tasks.description: Release the embryo at the target position and orientation

tasks.name: Check for Remaining Embryos
tasks.description: Check if there any remaining embryos in the list
